findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow does not exist or is insufficient
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions
Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose platform to legal risks
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal expert to assess potential liability

findings.issue: DPAs not in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Establish DPAs with all data processors

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update ToS to address AI-generated assessments
